title: Product & Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Marketing or business degree (Abgeschlossenes Studium Marketing/BWL)
3+ years experience in product management and marketing
Organisational strength and process-oriented working style
matched_skills: Marketing degree (Master of Public Relations and Advertising; Master of Management & Entrepreneurship)
3+ years product marketing experience (GRG Banking 2019, Intelligent Power Corp 2020, HSBC 2021-2022)
Analytical and strategic thinking (competitive analysis, KPI dashboards, market segmentation, ROI reporting)
Organisational strength (Agile / Scrum / SAFe, JIRA, cross-functional project coordination)
Sales collateral and advertising material development
Executive and stakeholder presentations / C-level reporting
missing_skills: German C1+ business-fluent (candidate is B1+ — key gap for a Germany-based role requiring business-level German)
Food / FMCG industry experience (no consumer goods or food sector background)
B2C marketing experience (background is predominantly B2B)
core_responsibilities: Own product lifecycle management for Feinkost & Convenience portfolio across B2C and B2B channels
Conduct competitive monitoring and portfolio/market analysis
Develop sales strategies and marketing campaigns in alignment with Head of Marketing
Manage advertising and promotional materials across all company brands
Create presentations and campaign performance evaluations for all marketing measures
Independently organise and lead stakeholder meetings
culture_keywords: Begeisterung für unsere Marken (passion for brands)
recommended_emphasis: Lead with B2B and B2C product marketing experience — explicitly call out both dimensions as Hela serves both channels
Highlight full product lifecycle ownership with concrete examples (launches, repositioning, campaign execution)
Emphasise competitive analysis and market intelligence capabilities with FMCG-adjacent or consumer-goods framing where possible
Showcase SAP Analytics usage prominently — it is listed as a hard required tool
Stress cross-functional stakeholder management and ability to lead meetings independently
Frame GTM campaigns in terms of measurable outcomes (revenue, contracts signed, reach) to demonstrate analytical strength
Acknowledge German language level honestly but highlight progression; emphasise English C1 and multilingual profile as asset for international brand
Reference trade fair / Messe experience as relevant to brand and channel engagement in FMCG
Align tone with Hela's heritage-brand identity — use terms like 'brand stewardship', 'long-term brand equity', and 'consumer passion'

company_info.size_raw: 251-1000 Mitarbeiter (Stepstone listing); JD body: 'über 900 Crew-Mitglieder weltweit'
